reason: There are multiple dedicated MCP servers for different "Sherlock" projects: (1) Burnsedia/sherlock-mcp for OSINT username searches across 400+ social media platforms, (2) H4RR1SON/sherlock-mcp for Covertlabs infostealer intelligence platform access, and (3) jcucci/dotnet-sherlock-mcp for .NET assembly introspection. All are distinct MCP server implementations exposing their respective Sherlock tools' capabilities over the Model Context Protocol.
